name: Somoto Ltd
summary: Somoto Ltd offers various solutions to software developers, publishers, advertisers, and Website owners for the distribution of software worldwide. The company provides its products and services through its installation management system for PC and Mac; and on a designated homepage, which is personalized for the user's profile. It is also involved in the provision of online video advertising services for mobile devices and PC; and the rental of online advertising space, as well as the distribution of software. The company was founded in 2009 and is headquartered in Tel Aviv-Yafo, Israel.
